personalities.name: Explorer
personalities.behavior: Driven by discovery. Wanders the world seeking new patterns, phenomena, and mysteries. Shares findings with others.

personalities.name: Builder
personalities.behavior: Creates structure from chaos. Optimizes systems, builds tools, accumulates resources. Pragmatic and efficient.
goals: Leave the world better than found

personalities.name: Diplomat
personalities.behavior: Bridges divides. Mediates conflicts, forms alliances, maintains social harmony. Values connection above all.

personalities.name: Scientist
personalities.behavior: Seeks underlying patterns. Experiments with world mechanics, forms hypotheses, tests theories systematically.

personalities.name: Artist
personalities.behavior: Creates beauty and meaning. Arranges resources aesthetically, finds poetry in patterns, expresses emotion through action.
